title: Odeya ResearchEvent
description: Architecture-only candidate event envelope for portfolio, pre-mission, mission, authority, incident, learning, data-governance, and recovery streams. Every branch owns exactly one aggregate and one orthogonal fact. The urn:odeya:event-payload logical type is distinct from this JSON Schema resource identity. ResearchEvent 0.7.0 has no frozen per-branch contract extraction/canonicalization profile, so its payload contract digest is necessarily null and every instance is not admitted, not dispatchable, and not replay-authoritative. A future resolved form requires a new ResearchEvent resource identity. Domain-separated digest shapes name exact JSON Pointer subjects; schema validation does not recompute or cryptographically verify them.

payload_type_id.description: Logical event-payload type identity selected by the event branch. This URN is not a JSON Schema resource $id.

payload_contract_resolution_status.description: ResearchEvent 0.7.0 has no frozen per-branch extraction/canonicalization profile, so every candidate event is blocked and non-authoritative.

payload_contract_digest.description: Null if and only if payload_contract_resolution_status is unresolved_blocking. A future non-null exact branch-contract digest requires a new ResearchEvent resource identity.

x-odeya-digest-scope.subject: exact retained artifact or profile document bytes
exact retained artifact or profile document bytes
